Hi Vishal, I created a small follow-up PR for the bootstrap pipeline parse issue we hit earlier.

The existing Test stage had environment set to ICECowboysTestD365, which the shared backend bootstrap template does not accept. I updated it to test so the pipeline can load properly from Develop and follow the Test → UAT flow.

PR is ready for review. If okay, please approve/merge or override as needed so I can rerun the backend/storage pipeline from Develop.
